LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TREGG SMITH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM APR-26-2012 TO LAW AND MOTION AT MAY-03-2012, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: CONTINUED TO MAY 3, 2012 TO GIVE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES 2.6B AND 2.6C. NO LATER THAN APRIL 27 DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS AND THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS RECEIVED COURTESY COPIES OF OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

ORDER OVERRULING DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT - CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TREGG SMITH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. OVERRULED. THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS IS ADEQUATELY PLED. PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 452, THE COURT CAN REASONABLY INFER THAT A PERSON BEING PUSHED OUT OF A 5-STORY WINDOW WILL EXPERIENCE SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. DEFENDANT TO FILE RESPONSIVE PLEADING BY 6/11/12. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-12-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Financial Information; P&A
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Igor Kopilenko, Esq. of allegiance law, Tel. 415.404.6395, appearing for plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RYAN SMITH's Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Financial Information is Granted with the limitation that any financial information will be pursuant to an agreed confidentiality agreement limiting disclosure to plaintiff's counsel and solely for use at trial and returning all documents containing any financial information to defendant at the conclusion of the trial. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Set For Trial On Jan-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Continued To Jun-29-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marglyn Paseka, Esq., from Law offices of Charles F. Bourdon, 415-864-5100, specially appearing for defendant and moving party
Jason A.J. Lundberg, Esq., from Allegiance Law, 415-404-6395, for Plaintiff and opposing party

JUDGE KAHN MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT MR. JASON LUNDBERT, WHO WAS AN EXTERN IN THIS COURT. THE JUDGE BELIEVES IT DOES NOT HAVE ANY BEARING ON HIS ABILITY TO BE IMPARTIAL. NO OBJECTIONS MADE.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TREGG SMITH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overruled. The cause of action for intentional infliction of emotional distress is adequately pled. Per Code of Civil Procedure section 452, the court can reasonably infer that a person being pushed out of a 5-story window will experience severe emotional distress. Defendant to file responsive pleading by 6/11/12. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Continued To May-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TREGG SMITH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to May 3, 2012 to give defendant an opportunity to comply with Local Rules 2.6B and 2.6C. No later than April 27 defendant is required to deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers and the first amended complaint to department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has received courtesy copies of opposition papers. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Continued To May-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TREGG SMITH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off calendar. First Amended Complaint was filed on February 17, 2012. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918
